metadata.title: Disscount - Find the best prices in Croatia
metadata.description: Compare product prices across Croatian stores, build shopping lists, and track discounts.

modal.terms: By continuing, you accept our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

taglines: Forget the cards - lighten your wallet!
Create and share a shopping list!
Scan a barcode and compare prices!
Find the best deals in Croatia!

home.metaTitle: Find the best prices in Croatia
home.metaDescription: App for shoppers in Croatia to compare store prices, create smart shopping lists, track loyalty cards, and get deal alerts with barcode scanning & AI suggestions.

resetPassword.missingToken: Token is missing. Request a new link via “Forgot password?” on the sign-in screen.

shoppingListDetail.metaDescription: View and manage items on your shopping list.

legal.draftNotice: This is a temporary, abridged version. The final legal document is in progress.

dataDeletion.metaDescription: How to delete your account and data from the Disscount app.
dataDeletion.title: Data deletion
dataDeletion.intro: Instructions for deleting your account and related data from Disscount.
dataDeletion.inAppBody: Sign in, open the account menu, and choose Security. There you can delete your account. Deletion removes your sign-in identity, and personal data (name, email, profile picture) is permanently removed.
dataDeletion.onRequestBody: If you can't access your account, send a deletion request to <mail>info@disscount.me</mail> from the email address linked to the account. We process requests within a reasonable time.
dataDeletion.whatDeletedBody: We remove your personal data and account access. Some anonymized records may be retained where required by law.

privacy.metaDescription: How Disscount collects and uses your data.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data Disscount collects and how it is used.
privacy.collectBody: When you sign in, we collect your name, email address, and, if available, profile picture from the sign-in provider (Google or Facebook). We also store data you create in the app, such as shopping lists and settings.
privacy.useBody: We use your data to provide the service, sign you in, display your lists and settings, and send the notifications you've enabled.
privacy.shareBody: We don't sell your data. We use Google and Facebook solely for sign-in via your existing accounts.
privacy.deleteBody: You can delete your account and related data at any time within the app. Instructions are on the data deletion page.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions, reach out at <mail>info@disscount.me</mail>.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for the Disscount app.
terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By using the Disscount app you accept these terms.
terms.acceptBody: By accessing or using the app you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.
terms.useBody: Disscount is for comparing prices and organizing shopping. You agree not to use the app for unlawful purposes or in a way that disrupts its operation.
terms.accountsBody: You are responsible for activity on your account. You can delete your account at any time within the app.
terms.liabilityBody: The app is provided "as is". Prices and data may differ from those in stores, and we don't guarantee their full accuracy.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactBody: For questions about the terms, reach out at <mail>info@disscount.me</mail>.

notifications.savingsDetail: (≥ {amount}€ on {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}})
notifications.noDiscountsToday: No discounts on your watched products today.
notifications.emptyPrompt: Add products to your watchlist and we'll notify you when the products you want go on sale in your stores!

validation.passwordRule: Password must be at least 12 characters and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and a number (0-9).
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameMax: Username can be at most 40 characters
validation.listTitleMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.titleMax100: Name can be at most 100 characters
validation.thresholdPositive: The threshold must be a positive number
validation.valueMax: Value can be at most 500 characters
validation.typeMax: Type can be at most 50 characters
validation.codeTypeMax: Code type can be at most 50 characters
validation.colorHex: Color must be in HEX format (#ffffff)
validation.noteMax: Note can be at most 500 characters

common.linkFallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
common.footerNotice: You're receiving this email because there's a Disscount account linked to this address. You can change your email settings when you <link>sign in to Disscount</link>.

verify.subject: Confirm your email address
verify.preview: Confirm your email address for Disscount
verify.heading: Confirm your email address
verify.intro: Thanks for signing up! Click the button below to confirm your email address and activate your Disscount account.
verify.footnote: If you didn't request this account, feel free to ignore this email.

reset.subject: Reset your password
reset.heading: Reset your password
reset.intro: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password. The link is valid for a limited time.
reset.footnote: If you didn't request this change, ignore this email - your password stays the same.

setPassword.subject: Set a password for your account
setPassword.preview: Set a password for your Disscount account
setPassword.heading: Set a password for your account
setPassword.intro: A Disscount account already exists for this email address (sign-in via Google or Facebook). Click the button below to set a password so you can also sign in with email in the future. The link is valid for a limited time.
setPassword.footnote: If you didn't request this, ignore this email - your account stays the same.

changeEmail.subject: Confirm your email change
changeEmail.heading: Confirm your email change
changeEmail.intro: A change of the email address for your Disscount account to {newEmail} was requested. Click the button below to confirm the change.
changeEmail.footnote: If you didn't request this change, change your password immediately and contact us - your address stays the same until you confirm.
